channel.title: Guess ? on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Ladis
item.description:
Any guesses what it could be ? :D

Comments

Comment by Aman…. on 2009-08-17 21:39:03 +0530

Okay I won’t say the obvious, this vehicle is owned by some one named Ladi and (s)he has just put it , Ladis 😉 . Smart eh!

Tun fotoan balian khichann lag gayan kaka , teri karni paini report 🙂 .

Aman….

Comment by Narry on 2009-08-17 22:45:00 +0530

You seriously need to start dating man !!!
